zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强中的区间整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD整体呈震荡偏强结构，价格运行在75美元上方，短线多头略占优，但动能有限，整体仍处于高位整理阶段。近期波动区间收窄，市场进入方向选择前的蓄势状态。

技术指标方面，价格站稳SMA20均线73.487上方，结构偏多；MACD维持正值1.0097，显示趋势动能仍在延续，但RSI缺失使超买判断不完整，短线需关注动能是否衰减。

支撑与阻力方面，下方支撑关注73.5一线均线位置及75.1日内低点，上方阻力集中在75.6至76区间。当前价格贴近高位，若无法突破易形成反复震荡。

操作建议以区间思路为主，在支撑附近分批低吸，在阻力区域逐步止盈。不宜在未放量突破前追多，若跌破73.5则短线趋势可能转为回调结构。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation around 75.36, showing a mild upward bias after recovering from recent pullbacks. Price action remains compressed between 75.12 and 75.58, indicating short-term equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite limited volatility, the structure suggests a constructive trend as the market holds above the 20-day SMA, signaling underlying strength and a gradual accumulation phase rather than distribution.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautiously bullish outlook. The MACD reading above zero at 1.0098 suggests positive momentum is present, though the lack of a visible signal line limits confirmation strength. In the absence of RSI data, price behavior becomes the primary guide, and sustained trading above the SMA(20) at 73.487 indicates buyers remain in control on dips. This alignment typically supports continuation bias if volume begins to expand.

Immediate resistance is located at 75.58, the recent high, followed by a broader supply zone around 76.00–76.80 where previous reactions may occur. On the downside, initial support sits at 75.12, marking the lower boundary of the current range, while stronger structural support is found at the SMA(20) near 73.49. A breakdown below 73.50 would weaken the bullish structure and expose downside toward 72.00.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor range-bound strategies until a clear breakout develops. Short-term participants may look to accumulate near 75.10–75.20 with tight risk control below 75.00, targeting resistance at 75.58 for partial profit-taking. Alternatively, a confirmed breakout above 75.60 with rising volume could open a move toward 76.50 or higher. Given the compressed range, disciplined risk management is essential due to frequent false breakout risk.
